title: Yuhsin Lin’s CV
text:
lin21022@byui.edu | My Linkedin page



Mechanical Engineering student at Brigham Young University- Idaho.



Engineering & Design Tools: SolidWorks (CSWA, CSWA-SD, CSWA-S), Finite Element Analysis (FEA), Revit, Thermal Design, and 3D printing.
Programming & Data Analysis: Python, Machine Learning, R, MySQL, and Mathematica.
Microcontroller Systems: Arduino, PID Control Systems, and Micro:bit.
Professional: Analytical thinking, data-driven decision making, and cross-functional team collaboration.





Mechatronics: Arduino-based PID temperature control system.
Thermal Systems: HVAC ventilation design/thermal load analysis.
Mechanical Design: Hands-free access assistants.





September 2022 - April 2027 (Anticipated) Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, ID

Bachelor’s Degree in Mechanical Engineering
Minor in Data Science
GPA: 4.0/4.0
Member of Tau Beta Pi National Engineering Society





Certified SolidWorks Associate (CSWA)
SolidWorks Associate Sustainability (CSWA-SD)
SolidWorks Simulation Associate (CSWA-S)




September 2022 - Present Teacher Assistant/Tutor, Brigham Young University - Idaho

Supported diverse students learning 5+ STEM courses, including mechatronic systems, engineering statistics, physics, and chemistry.
Collaborated with professors on grading, assignment design, and review sessions.
Developed strong mentoring and communication skills to convey complex academic concepts.

April 2023 - August 2023 Assembler Intern, Polaris

Performed wide variety of tasks including preparing vehicle parts, sub-systems, and components.
Improved product line efficiency through proactive problem solving and teamwork.
Inspected approximately 80 vehicles per day on a moving assembly line with a nearly 100% defect-free quality rate.

August 2021 - December 2021 Teacher Assistant, Kumon

Trained 50 students in Math, English, and Chinese.
Acquired leadership and interpersonal skills by organizing classes and cooperating with staff.




September 2023 - February 2025 Full-time Volunteer Missionary, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

Dedicated 18 months to community service and outreach in Ontario, Canada.
Selected as a leader of 20+ representatives, providing training, coordination, and motivational support.
Mentored 100+ individuals weekly, strengthening cross-cultural communication skills in native Chinese and professional English.
